title: helictotrichon convolutum subsp. heldreichii
intro: Helictotrichon convolutum subsp. heldreichii, also known as Heldreich's hair grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family, Poaceae. This perennial grass is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Heldreich's hair grass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Heldreich's hair grass can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions.
